headline: Building Automation System Company Evaluation Report 2025: Johnson Controls, Honeywell and Siemens Lead with AI-Driven Energy Management, Building Automation and Integrated Safety Systems
summary: The Building Automation System Companies Quadrant offers in-depth insights into the global BAS market, highlighting top players, tech advancements, and industry trends. This analysis categorizes the 28 leading companies, including Johnson Controls, Honeywell International, and Siemens, as quadrant leaders. headline: Honeywell takes next step in aerospace spinoff, offers more details
summary: The Honeywell Aerospace offshoot is expected to become a publicly traded company in the third quarter of 2026.

headline: Op-ed: What $5 billion humanoid robots taught me about risk, jobs and the future of the economy
summary: Apptronik has risen in value from $15 million to $5 billion and now has Google DeepMind as a partner. There's a very big idea backing the robotics startup.
